svg.text: Same scpd image as the parent · enrolled to a parent · fully operational when disconnected

g.text: verify Ed25519 signature · hash chain · resume from cursor
idempotent replay through the public write path (convergent)
validate approval attestations against origin-domain keys

svg.text: hand-filled ⇒ provenance: manual (unverified) — reconciled on next signed import
child may only add stricter local policy + overlays (annotates)

g.text: signed with the child's Ed25519 key

svg.text: scpd — child domain instance · child is the single-writer authority for all local objects

g.text: clients: Web UI · CLI · SDK · IaC — /v1 only
AuthN: OIDC · local · PAT — AuthZ: RBAC

svg.text: Coordination Engine — durable state machine (Postgres + pg-boss · watchdog)
one guarded transition fn: gate check + audit event + Decision — atomic
parallel waves fan out · a fan-in gate requires every target of the prior wave green
gates bind required controls — advisory / recommended controls only annotate
watchdog: no progress within the state's SLA → Decision + escalation

g.text: security scans: Trivy · Snyk · Semgrep · Grype (control plugins)
quality: unit · integration · smoke — operational: health · canary · bake
approvals N-of-M → Ed25519 attestation signed at creation
freezes + audited override (reason required) · emergency path
outcomes: pass · fail · warning · skipped · timed_out · expired → evidence

svg.text: correlate: repo+path · commit SHA · artifact digest · key
app + infra + config repos → one CoordinatedChange
Rollback — a first-class Change through the same wave machinery
triggers: gate/control failure · canary threshold · health check · policy violation · manual (always available)
action: prior Argo revision · previous artifact digest · prior IaC state ref — the Decision names the trigger
every verdict → Decision record (inputs + reason tree) · scp change explain
hash-chained audit written in-transaction · scp audit verify · anchored to storage
all engine state lives here — any worker resumes any change after a crash
Plugin host — subprocess per plugin instance · JSON-RPC over stdio · timeouts · restart + backoff · resource limits

g.text: asks SCP for a gate verdict pre-apply
plan → evidence · apply after gates pass
rollback via prior state ref → infra

svg.text: executor verbs: observe · trigger · status · abort — SCP holds execution-system API credentials only (single exception: the managed-iac isolated runner)
